About / 01

Built around precision.

A trusted industrial piping contractor delivering complex mechanical systems from design through installation.

YY ENC USA combines global project experience with localized execution. We specialize in process piping, toxic-gas systems, insulation and jacketing, HVAC, and mechanical equipment installation — serving manufacturing, chemical, and energy facilities across the United States.

Business strategy

Precise engineering, detailed planning, and safe execution. We deliver cost-effective solutions built to each client's requirements — without compromising safety or quality.

Process skid — stainless

Capability schedule

Key business areas.

P·01
Process Piping

Process Piping Systems

Engineered process lines for demanding service — fabricated and installed to code.

P·02
Utility Piping

Utility Piping

Chilled water, steam, gas, and plant utilities routed for reliability and access.

P·03
Toxic-Gas Piping

Toxic Gas Piping

Specialty and hazardous-service gas piping built for containment and compliance.

P·04
Insulation

Insulation & Jacketing

Thermal insulation and metal jacketing that protect systems and hold up on site.

P·05
Mechanical

Mechanical Equipment Installation

Rigging, setting, and connecting heavy equipment — from crane pick to commissioning.

P·06
Prefabrication

Prefabrication & Modular Assembly

Shop-fabricated spools and skids modeled in 3D for faster, tighter field installs.

Safety / OSHA compliant

Zero incidents. Every project.

Safety is our top priority. We follow OSHA regulations and enforce internal protocols at every site, with regular training and hazard-awareness programs to minimize risk and maintain compliance.

OSHA Occupational Safety & Health Administration
0
Incident goal on every project we run.
  • ✓ Daily Job Safety Analysis (JSA)
  • ✓ Site-specific safety orientation
  • ✓ PPE enforcement and inspections
  • ✓ Emergency response readiness
  • ✓ Zero-incident goal on every project

Safety isn't just a policy — it's part of our culture.
